revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''2-2-000

An assembly of optically refracting or reflecting elements (or both) and their supporting frames.

Through the agency of these elements, rays emitted by a light source are deflected into new directions as required.

[[Image:Ch2_Fig10.jpg|400px|border]]
